reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar para hacer un parate en la ruta, el verde de alrededor es lo que te hace relajar

(Translated by Google)
A very nice place to stop on the route, the green surroundings are what makes you relax.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNacU95Ty1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pasamos de ida y pasamos de vuelta, en las dos ocasiones y de distintas personas muy buena atención, volveremos muchas gracias

(Translated by Google)
We stopped there both ways, and on both occasions, the service was excellent, even from different people. We'll be back. Thank you very much.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwXzliNjBnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Clásica parada en la ruta 2, más cómoda para cuándo se va para Buenos Aires. Baños bien para la gente que recibe, si pondría más gente atendiendo dos chicas para toda la gente que había era una atención deficiente.

(Translated by Google)
A classic stop on Route 2, more convenient when heading to Buenos Aires. The restrooms are adequate for the number of people they serve, but they should hire more staff; two girls were serving all the customers, which was a significant drawback.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwODdMRnV3RRAB
